summary: Iteration 74 - Verified Desktop UI fixes: Sidebar z-index on Map page, On-Demand Settings in Photo Tools menu for Photographer role, On-Demand Settings page access, Photo Tools expand/collapse functionality. All 4 features verified working correctly.

minor.issue: 404 errors in console - may be missing booking data or endpoint issue

sidebar_on_map_page.details: Sidebar visible on Map page with z-index=100, positioned at x=0, width=200px

on_demand_settings_in_photo_tools.details: On-Demand Settings menu item visible in Photo Tools for Photographer role

on_demand_settings_page_access.details: On-Demand Settings page accessible at /photographer/on-demand-settings for Photographer role

photo_tools_expand_collapse.details: Photo Tools menu expands/collapses correctly - submenu items visible when expanded, hidden when collapsed

critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar.js line 171: z-[100] correctly applied for Map page overlay fix
Sidebar.js line 155: canUseOnDemand correctly includes 'Photographer' role (was likely missing before)
OnDemandSettingsPage.js line 52: canAccess matches sidebar's canUseOnDemand roles
context_for_next_testing_agent: Desktop UI fixes verified: 1) Sidebar z-index=100 ensures visibility on Map page, 2) On-Demand Settings accessible for Photographer role (not just Pro), 3) Photo Tools expand/collapse working. Mobile drawer scroll testing with vaul library was not explicitly tested in this iteration (secondary priority).
rca_of_the_issue: No issues found - all Desktop UI fixes verified working as intended.
